rule_metadata.name: where
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'where' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule where
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'where' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "where"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\swhere\s\/r\sC\:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\\s.{0,1000}Microsoft\.ActiveDirectory\.Management\.dll/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
